scripts.lint:assets: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.minify:js: esbuild assets/zola/search.js --minify --outfile=assets/zola/search.min.js && esbuild assets/zola/stl-viewer.js --minify --outfile=assets/zola/stl-viewer.min.js && esbuild assets/zola/three-model-viewer.js --minify --outfile=assets/zola/three-model-viewer.min.js && esbuild web/admin.js --minify --outfile=web/admin.min.js
scripts.minify:css: lightningcss --minify --bundle assets/zola/style.css -o assets/zola/style.min.css && lightningcss --minify --bundle web/app.css -o web/app.min.css
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.check:minified: npm run minify && git diff --exit-code -- assets/zola/search.min.js assets/zola/stl-viewer.min.js assets/zola/three-model-viewer.min.js assets/zola/style.min.css web/admin.min.js web/app.min.css
